definitions: To experience the same unpleasant treatment that one has given to others.
To be treated in the same bad way that you have treated other people.
examples: After years of teasing others, he finally got a taste of his own medicine when his friends played a prank on him.
She used to spread rumors, but now she's getting a taste of her own medicine as people are talking about her.
The bully got a taste of his own medicine when a new student stood up to him.
lemma: get a taste of one's own medicine
synonyms: give someone a dose of their own medicine
source: get a taste of your own medicine
